OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Florence Fung is present.
Attorney, Brenda Cruz Keith is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Christine Danner is present.
Attorney, Erica Zepko is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of April 02, 2013 remains on calendar.
